description: Web UI Metrics Dashboard + Real-time Charts + Security Hardening. Add Chart.js visualizations for success rates, iteration distribution, evolution velocity. Add CORS, rate limiting, input sanitization, and workspace sandboxing to the web API.
steps: Add GET /api/metrics endpoint to web/app.py that returns: overall_health (from EvolutionMetrics), per_node_success_rates, evolution_velocity (changes per 10 iterations from history.jsonl), iteration_distribution (count per node from reflections.jsonl), skill_usage_frequency (from skills/_metrics.yaml if exists)
Add GET /api/metrics/history endpoint that returns time-series data for charting: success_rate_over_time (bucketed by 10-iteration windows from reflections.jsonl)

Update web/templates/dashboard.html to include Chart.js via CDN with: line chart for success rate over time, bar chart for iteration distribution per node, gauge/number for overall health score, color-coded per-node success rates (green > 80%, yellow > 50%, red < 50%)
Add CORS middleware to FastAPI app (allow configurable origins, default localhost)
Add simple rate limiting middleware (max 60 requests/minute per IP using in-memory counter with sliding window)
Add input sanitization to POST /api/goal - strip HTML, limit length to 500 chars, reject empty
Add workspace boundary validation to all file-reading endpoints (cannot read outside project root)
Create .env.example at project root with all configurable settings: HOST, PORT, CORS_ORIGINS, RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE, KERNEL_ROOT
Add tests for metrics endpoints, CORS headers, rate limiting behavior, input sanitization, and path traversal rejection to tests/test_web.py
acceptance_criteria: /api/metrics returns correct health and distribution data
Chart.js charts render in dashboard HTML (verified by presence of canvas elements and chart initialization JS)
Rate limiting rejects excessive requests with 429 status
Input sanitization strips HTML and rejects overly long or empty goals
findings: All 49 web tests pass (18 new). Full suite: 995 tests, 98.48% coverage. Changed set_goal to return 400 status for empty/too-long goals (was 200 with error in body). Rate limiting is configurable via rate_limit param in create_app(). CORS allows localhost:8000 and 127.0.0.1:8000 by default.
